    *   **Footer:** Logo "GCT" and website "www.gct.co".

2.  **Define Bounding Boxes:** I need to estimate coordinates for each text block and table cell. The image size is roughly 1000x1400 (based on typical aspect ratios, but I will use relative coordinates normalized to 1000x1000 or just pixel values if I were a machine, but here I will simulate the extraction).
